name: Compare
summary: A before/after comparison component with interactive slider that allows users to drag and reveal differences between two images, states, or versions for compelling visual comparisons.
detailedDescription: The Compare component provides an interactive before/after comparison experience through a draggable slider that reveals the difference between two images or content states. This powerful visual tool is perfect for showcasing transformations, improvements, or feature differences in an engaging, hands-on way. Users grab a handle and drag horizontally (or vertically) to reveal more of one image while concealing the other, creating an intuitive comparison experience. The component includes a visible slider handle with optional labels indicating 'before' and 'after' states. Smooth transitions and responsive tracking ensure the comparison feels fluid and natural. The component supports any image content including product photos, design mockups, edited vs original photos, UI redesigns, or data visualizations. Perfect for portfolios showing design work, fitness transformations, photo editing showcases, product improvement demonstrations, or any context where visual comparison tells a compelling story. The interactive nature increases engagement as users actively explore the differences rather than passively viewing static images.
purpose: Enable interactive before/after comparisons through draggable slider
Showcase transformations, improvements, or differences compellingly
Increase user engagement through hands-on comparison exploration
Support visual storytelling for portfolios, edits, and improvements
Provide intuitive comparison interface requiring no explanation
behavior: Renders two images or content layers in identical alignment
Provides draggable slider handle for revealing/hiding content
Tracks drag position smoothly for fluid comparison experience
Supports both horizontal and vertical comparison orientations
Displays optional before/after labels for clarity
Maintains image alignment during slider movement
Responds to touch, mouse, and keyboard interactions
visualCharacteristics: Clear before/after visual separation with slider divider
Draggable handle providing obvious interaction affordance
Smooth, responsive slider movement feeling natural
Professional presentation suitable for any comparison context
Optional labels and styling for brand alignment
Clean, focused design emphasizing comparison content
recommendations: Use where moderate motion and reusable composition improve UX and clarity.
